title: Hardcore Respawn
body:
# ❓What does the mod do?

**Adds timer after death that will be respawn player at the spawnpoint.**

# ✨Features :
- Timer that will be respawn player
- Timer for time what u want.

# 🏓Extra info

- Mod can contains errors!
- Mod working only in hardcore!

  
**Mod available on** [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hardcore-respawn)!

## ❓How to turn off a respawn?

You need to go to the rule settings when u creating world and u can see this:
![guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e10dd0b0c0197201d10a213a3cdebc9468f35c1_0.webp)
